Options_Behaviour.description: Options section header for behaviour settings

Options_ClearLogs.description: Button text for clearing debug logs

Options_DarkMode.message: Show Fuskr with a dark background

Options_DarkMode_Description.message: Changes the background of image sets to a darker colour. Will take effect once you refresh pages.

Options_Debug_Description.message: Use this panel to export debug logs when reporting issues. Logs help diagnose problems and improve the extension.

Options_DefaultImageDisplayMode.description: Label for default image display mode options

Options_DisplayModeDescription.description: Description for image display mode setting
Options_DisplayModeDescription.message: Choose how images are displayed by default in the gallery

Options_EnableLogging.description: Checkbox label for enabling debug logging

Options_EnableLogging_Description.message: When enabled, Fuskr will collect debug information to help diagnose issues. Logs are stored locally and never sent anywhere automatically.

Options_EnableOverloadProtection_Descrip.message: When enabled, Fuskr will warn you before generating galleries with a large number of images to prevent browser slowdown or crashes.

Options_EnableStickyControls_Description.message: When enabled, gallery controls remain visible at the top of the page when you scroll. Disable for compact scrolling.

Options_ErrorSaving.description: Error message when settings fail to save

Options_ExportLogs.description: Button text for exporting debug logs

Options_FullScreenGalleryDefault.description: Checkbox label for default full-screen gallery layout setting
Options_FullScreenGalleryDefault.message: Use full-screen gallery layout by default

Options_FullScreenGalleryDescription.description: Description for full-screen gallery layout setting
Options_FullScreenGalleryDescription.message: Allow the gallery to use the full page width instead of the standard 1400px layout

Options_History_Keep.message: Keep a recent history of fusks

Options_History_Keep_Description.message: Every time you create a new gallery, the extension records the created url (up to the last 10). Clicking on the url will re-generate that gallery.

Options_ImageDisplay.description: Options section header for image display settings

Options_OpenNewFusksInForeground.message: Open new fusks in the foreground

Options_OpenNewFusksInForeground_Descrip.message: When you create a new gallery, you may not wish to open it in the foreground. By unchecking this option, any new gallery will appear in the background instead.

Options_OverloadProtectionLimit_Descript.message: Maximum number of images to generate before showing a warning. Default: 250 images.

Options_PrivacyNote_Description.message: Debug logs may contain URLs and settings data. Review exported logs before sharing them for support.

Options_ResetConfirmation.description: Confirmation dialog when user clicks reset to defaults
Options_ResetConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to reset all options to their default values? Your gallery history will be preserved, but all other settings will be lost.
